Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Genicis Aguliar appeared via zoom for Christopher Mitchell (petitioner).

Ms. Aguilar requested a 60 continuance, that they are having issue getting letters issues in regard to the new bond. The matter is continued to October 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Genicis Aguilar for Brian Mitchell and Christopher Mitchell (deceased), Petitioners (via Zoom).

The matter was heard on two petitions: (1) a petition for letters of administration appointing Brian Mitchell as successor administrator, and (2) the first and final report of the previous administrator, Christopher Mitchell, who is now deceased.

The Court confirmed there were no objections filed. Several procedural issues outlined by the Probate Examiner were discussed. Ms. Aguilar requested appointment of Brian Mitchell as successor administrator in order to complete distribution of the estate. She stated that the accounting was prepared prior to the administrator's passing and had not changed.

Following discussion, the Court waived procedural defects and took the Petition for Letters of Administration under submission with the intent to grant.

The Court advised that the first and final report could not proceed as filed and must be refiled by the successor administrator. Ms. Aguilar estimated that a new petition could be prepared within 30 to 60 days. The Court set a status hearing on closing the estate for September 3, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and took the current petition for final distribution off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer C. Fu, via Zoom, for Christopher S. Mitchell, Petitioner.

The court notes the lack of progress and of the several missing filings in this matter. Ms. Fu reports that there had been issues bonding her client and in contacting beneficiaries. Ms. Fu reports of the intent to file the required documents and requests a continuance to do so. The court confirms with Ms. Fu that she has the Examiner's notes which detail what the court requires to move this matter forward.

The matter is continued to Oct-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
